EBITDA Confirmation Letter
Exhibit A-1 to Engagement Agreement
Company
{{companyName}}
CPA Firm
{{cpaFirm}}
Effective Date
{{effectiveDate}}
Engagement Reference
{{ref}}
§ 01Purpose

This letter formalizes the agreement between the Company's independent Certified Public Accountant and Forhemit Transition Stewardship ("Forhemit") on the Quality of Earnings ("QofE")-normalized Trailing Twelve Month ("TTM") Earnings Before Interest, Taxes, Depreciation, and Amortization ("EBITDA") figure that will serve as the basis for the Company's engagement fee tier assignment under the Engagement Letter dated {{engagementDate}}.

§ 02Confirmed EBITDA Figure
Confirmed
{{ebitdaAmount}}
{{measurementPeriod}}
{{feeTier}}
§ 03Normalization Adjustments

The following adjustments were applied to arrive at the normalized TTM EBITDA figure:

{{reportedNetIncome}}
{{addBackInterest}}
{{addBackTaxes}}
{{addBackDepreciation}}
{{addBackAmortization}}
{{ownerAdjustments}}
{{nonRecurringItems}}
{{ebitdaAmount}}
§ 04Fee Tier Implications

Based on the confirmed EBITDA figure of {{ebitdaAmount}}, the engagement is assigned to {{feeTier}}, resulting in the following fee structure:

{{totalFee}}
{{retainerAmount}}
{{validationAmount}}
{{commitmentAmount}}
{{successAmount}}
{{stewardshipRate}}
Note: These amounts will be incorporated into the Engagement Letter (Exhibit A) upon execution by both parties.
§ 05Representations

By signing below, the CPA confirms that:

(a) The financial statements used in the QofE analysis are prepared in accordance with the applicable financial reporting framework;

(b) The normalization adjustments represent the CPA's professional judgment regarding recurring, sustainable earnings capacity;

(c) No material undisclosed adjustments, contingencies, or events subsequent to the measurement period would materially affect the confirmed figure.

§ 06Effect

This Confirmation Letter is incorporated by reference into the Engagement Letter between the Company and Forhemit. In the event of any conflict between this letter and the Engagement Letter regarding the EBITDA figure or fee tier, this letter governs.

Agreement: Execution of this letter by both parties constitutes agreement on the EBITDA figure and fee tier for all purposes under the Engagement Letter.
—Signatures
